about.page.header.title: About Khandesh Youth Foundation
about.page.header.subtitle: Nurturing Tomorrow's Leaders Today
about.who.title: Who We Are
about.who.text: The Khandesh Youth Foundation is a dynamic organization dedicated to the holistic development of young individuals in Dhule. We are committed to fostering leadership, creativity, and social responsibility among youth through various educational, cultural, and sports programs.
about.vision.title: Our Vision
about.vision.text: To be the leading youth organization in Dhule, empowering young minds to become responsible, innovative, and socially conscious leaders of tomorrow.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.text: To provide comprehensive development programs that enhance academic excellence, foster personal growth, and promote community engagement among youth.
about.values.title: Our Core Values
about.values.excellence: We strive for excellence in everything we do and encourage our members to reach their full potential.
about.values.integrity: We uphold the highest standards of honesty and transparency in all our activities.
about.values.community: We believe in the power of community and work towards collective growth and development.
about.values.innovation: We encourage creative thinking and innovative approaches to solve real-world problems.
about.values.inclusion: We welcome diverse perspectives and create an inclusive environment for all members.
about.values.growth: We are committed to continuous learning and personal development for all our members.
about.history.title: Our Journey
about.history.text: Founded with a vision to create positive change in the lives of young people, Khandesh Youth Foundation has grown to become a beacon of hope and opportunity for youth in the region.
about.timeline.2015.text: Khandesh Youth Foundation was established with a small group of passionate youth.
about.timeline.2017.text: Expanded our programs and reached 500+ active members.
about.timeline.2020.text: Pivoted to digital platforms to serve youth during challenging times.
about.timeline.2023.text: Launched new initiatives including tech workshops and mentorship programs.

contact.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
contact.faq.q1: How do I become a member?
contact.faq.a1: Send us a message through the contact form or visit our office with basic identification. Membership is open to all youth aged 13-25 years.
contact.faq.a2: We offer affordable membership options. Contact our office for current membership plans and rates.
contact.faq.a3: Activities are held regularly throughout the week. Different programs have different schedules. Check activities page for details.
contact.faq.a4: Yes! We welcome volunteers of all backgrounds. Fill the volunteer form or contact us for more information.
contact.faq.q5: How can I register for events?
contact.faq.a5: You can register for events through our contact form or by visiting our office. Registration details are provided in event announcements.
contact.faq.a6: Most programs are free for members. Some special workshops and events may have minimal fees to cover materials and speakers.
